custom_design.title: Custom Design Lab
custom_design.subtitle: Bring your fandom to life. We print what you imagine.
custom_design.intro_text: Got a gaming meme, a classic movie poster, your favorite anime panel, or personal artwork? Tell us your idea. We'll turn it into a premium streetwear piece.
custom_design.support_types: We design custom wear for: Games, Movies, TV Shows, Singers, Football Clubs, Anime, Personal Art, Memes, and Original Ideas.
custom_design.desc_placeholder: Describe your desired design, prints, front/back details, colors, etc.
custom_design.images_hint: Upload screenshots, sketches, or reference designs (Max 3)
custom_design.success_desc: We have received your custom request. Now click below to open our Instagram DM and send us your username to finalize the design!
custom_design.dm_text_template: Hey Fandom Fit! I just submitted a custom design request under the name {name} (Instagram: {username}). My idea is: {desc}
custom_design.drag_drop: Drag & drop files here, or click to browse

offers.subtitle: Limited ticket coupons. Click to copy and mention in your order.
offers.promo1_desc: Upgrade to our premium heavy fabric and get 25% off your second shirt.
offers.promo2_desc: Tag a friend in our DMs. You both get 15% off your next fandom print.

why_choose_us.title: Why Fandom Fit?
why_choose_us.subtitle: Every thread is woven for fandom lovers.
why_choose_us.egypt_made_desc: Supporting local craftsmanship with the finest materials.
why_choose_us.ships_egypt_desc: Fast shipping to all governorates right to your doorstep.
why_choose_us.premium_quality_desc: High-durability prints that don't fade, crack, or peel.
why_choose_us.inspired_fandoms_desc: Designs created by actual fans, for actual fans.
why_choose_us.custom_available_desc: Your memes, your bands, your clubs - printed on demand.
why_choose_us.unisex_clothing_desc: Oversized, relaxed fits made for everyone.
why_choose_us.two_fabrics_desc: Choose between Standard Cotton and Premium Heavy Cotton.
why_choose_us.multiple_sizes_desc: From S to XXL to guarantee the perfect relaxed fit.

about_section.title: Fandom Fit Studio
about_section.p1: Fandom Fit is born from a simple obsession: merging our ultimate passions with premium streetwear. We are an Egyptian apparel brand dedicated to creating high-quality, handcrafted statement pieces for gamers, movie buffs, anime heads, football fanatics, and music lovers.
about_section.p2: We believe your clothing should tell a story. No generic templates, no boring designs. Every drop is curated with meticulous attention to detail, using the finest local fabrics to give you that soft, heavy, oversized vintage feel.
about_section.quote: "Wear what you love, loud and proud."

shipping.title: Egypt-Wide Shipping
shipping.subtitle: From Alexandria to Aswan, we've got you covered.

faq_section.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq_section.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Fandom Fit.
faq_section.a1: Browse our catalog, choose your design, select your size & fabric, and click the 'Order Directly' button. Complete the quick checkout form, and your order is placed! You can also click to order directly via Instagram DMs if you prefer.
faq_section.a2: Standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days across all Egyptian governorates.
faq_section.q3_ans: Yes! We ship to all governorates, including Cairo, Giza, Alexandria, Delta, Canal, and Upper Egypt.
faq_section.q4: Can I request my own design?
faq_section.a4: Absolutely! Go to our 'Custom Design' section, upload your reference images and ideas, submit the form, and our design team will contact you directly to bring your unique design to life.
faq_section.a5: Yes, all our fits are unisex, featuring a modern oversized relaxed streetwear silhouette.
faq_section.a6: We offer sizes from S to XXL. Check out our size guide overlay in the product details for precise measurements.

contact_section.title: Join the Club
contact_section.subtitle: Drop us a line, check our latest drops, or start your custom order.
